channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RITES] RITES Ltd Announces Changes in Senior Management: Mrs. Shobhana Palli Transferred, Colonel Mahesh Narayan Included
item.description:
RITES Ltd has announced changes in its senior management pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mrs. Shobhana Palli, GGM/Civil & Regional Head- SRPO, has been transferred and posted under RI Vertical, Gurgaon (Shikhar) and taken over charge as Vertical Head/ RI & Metro. Colonel Mahesh Narayan, GGM/ Civil, has been transferred from RI Vertical, Gurgaon to SRPO/ Bangalore and has taken over the charge of Regional Head, Southern Region Project Office (SRPO), and is therefore included in the Senior Management of the Company. Mrs. Shobhana Palli has over 31 years of professional experience and Colonel Mahesh Narayan is a veteran infrastructure strategist with over 30 years of experience.

  • Mrs. Shobhana Palli transferred and posted as Vertical Head/ RI & Metro
  • Colonel Mahesh Narayan included in the Senior Management of the Company
  • Mrs. Shobhana Palli has over 31 years of professional experience
  • Colonel Mahesh Narayan is a veteran infrastructure strategist with over 30 years of experience
  • Colonel Mahesh Narayan recognized for his expertise in airport infrastructure and pavement engineering

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RITES Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SAATVIKGL] Saatvik Green Energy's CHRO, Aman Attree, Resigns Effective April 8, 2026
item.description:
Saatvik Green Energy Ltd. has announced the resignation of its Chief Human Resource Officer (CHRO), Mr. Aman Attree, with effect from April 8, 2026. The resignation is due to personal health reasons. Mr. Attree has served as a Senior Management Personnel at the company and his departure will be effective from the close of business hours on the mentioned date.

  • Aman Attree resigns from the position of CHRO at Saatvik Green Energy Ltd.
  • The resignation is due to personal health reasons.
  • Mr. Attree will be relieved of his duties from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026.
  • Saatvik Green Energy Ltd. is a part of the Saatvik Group and is headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd | Category: Resignation

item.title: [SOLIDSTON] Solid Stone Company Ltd. Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Audited Financial Results Announcement for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Solid Stone Company Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for all promoters, directors, designated employees, and insiders as per the company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading and SEBI regulations. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider the audited financial results will be informed separately.

  • Trading window closure for promoters, directors, designated employees, and insiders from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure continues till 48 hours after the announcement of audited financial results for FY 2025-2026
  • Board meeting date to consider audited financial results to be informed separately
  • Closure in accordance with Solid Stone Company's Code of Conduct and SEBI regulations
  • Applicable to the financial year ending 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOLID STONE COMPANY LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EUROPRATIK] Euro Pratik Sales Ltd Subsidiary Acquires 51% Stake in Element Trading Co for AED 51,000
item.description:
Euro Pratik Trade FZCO, a wholly owned subsidiary of Euro Pratik Sales Ltd, has acquired a 51% stake in Element Trading Co (LLC) for a consideration of AED 51,000. This acquisition makes Element Trading Co (LLC) a stepdown subsidiary of Euro Pratik Sales Ltd. The acquisition is aimed at expanding Euro Pratik Sales Ltd's market reach in Dubai. Element Trading Co (LLC) was incorporated on 18th December, 2024 and has a capital of AED 100,000 with no turnover. The acquisition is not a related party transaction and will be completed by 30th September, 2026. The consideration will be paid in cash.

  • Euro Pratik Trade FZCO acquires 51% stake in Element Trading Co (LLC) for AED 51,000
  • Element Trading Co (LLC) becomes a stepdown subsidiary of Euro Pratik Sales Ltd
  • Acquisition aimed at expanding market reach in Dubai
  • Element Trading Co (LLC) incorporated on 18th December, 2024 with a capital of AED 100,000 and no turnover
  • Consideration will be paid in cash and acquisition to be completed by 30th September, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VARDMNPOLY] Vardhman Polytex Ltd Settles Outstanding Dues with Phoenix ARC, Curing Earlier Default
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vardhman Polytex Limited has successfully repaid and settled the entire outstanding dues of Phoenix ARC Private Limited using the proceeds from the Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the Company. This repayment has led to the curing and resolution of the earlier default that was being reported to the Stock Exchanges on a quarterly basis. As a result, approximately Rs. 300 Crore pertaining to previous debt settlement liabilities will be written back.

  • Vardhman Polytex Ltd has fully repaid and settled outstanding dues with Phoenix ARC
  • The repayment has been made using proceeds from NCDs issued by the Company
  • Earlier default reported to Stock Exchanges has been cured and resolved
  • Approximately Rs. 300 Crore will be written back due to debt settlement liabilities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN POLYTEX LTD. | Category: Debt Settlement

item.title: [SAATVIKGL] Saatvik Green Energy Ltd CFO Mr. Abani Kant Jha Resigns Effective April 07, 2026
item.description:
Saatvik Green Energy Ltd (formerly known as Saatvik Green Energy Private Limited) has announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer (CFO), Mr. Abani Kant Jha, with effect from April 07, 2026. Mr. Jha has served as the Key Managerial Personnel of the company and has expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to contribute to the company's growth journey. The company has attached a copy of his resignation letter and the relevant details of Mr. Jha as required under the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Mr. Abani Kant Jha resigns from the position of Chief Financial Officer at Saatvik Green Energy Ltd.
  • His resignation will take effect from April 07, 2026.
  • Mr. Jha has served as a Key Managerial Personnel of the company.
  • He has expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to contribute to the company's growth.
  • The company has attached a copy of his resignation letter and the relevant details of Mr. Jha as required under the SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd | Category: Resignation

item.title: [KRONOX] Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd Clarifies on Share Price Movement, No Connection to Management
item.description:
Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd has issued a clarification regarding the movement in its share price, stating that it has always disclosed all material information to the stock exchange as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is not aware of the reason for the significant movement in its share price and reiterates its commitment to adhere to all compliances required under the Listing Regulations and other applicable laws.

  • Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd clarifies share price movement
  • Company has always disclosed material information to the stock exchange
  • Movement in share price is market driven
  • Management of the company is not connected with the share price movement
  • Company reiterates commitment to adhere to all compliances

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HARISH] Harish Textile Engineers Delay Payment of Interest on Unlisted NCDs Due to Financial Constraints
item.description:
Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has delayed the payment of interest amounting to Rs. 3,65,070 on its 7% Unlisted, Secured, Unrated, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (Old Series-III & Series-IV Debentures) due to ongoing financial constraints. The total interest due for the period October 2025 to March 2026 was Rs. 7,38,253, out of which the Company has paid Rs. 3,73,183 for the period October 2025 to December 2025. The Company is making efforts to arrange the necessary funds for settlement of the outstanding interest and redemption obligations.

  • Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has delayed the payment of interest on its Unlisted NCDs.
  • The total interest due for the period October 2025 to March 2026 was Rs. 7,38,253.
  • The Company has paid Rs. 3,73,183 for the period October 2025 to December 2025.
  • The delay in payment is due to ongoing financial constraints.
  • The Company is making efforts to arrange the necessary funds for settlement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harish Textile Engineers Ltd | Category: Delayed Payment

item.title: [VIKASLIFE] Vikas Lifecare Schedules Board Meeting to Discuss Growth Strategy and Fund Raising
item.description:
Vikas Lifecare Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 11, 2026, to discuss various matters including the company's business strategy for growth, business plans for the current fiscal year, and a proposal for raising funds through issuance of securities. The meeting will also cover all incidental matters. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the company will remain closed for promoters, members of the promoter group, directors, designated persons, and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the outcome of this Board Meeting or the declaration of all financial results, whichever is later.

  • Vikas Lifecare Ltd Board Meeting scheduled on April 11, 2026
  • Discussion on company's business, strategy for growth, and business plans for the current fiscal year
  • Proposal for raising funds through issuance of securities
  • Trading window for securities dealing closed for promoters, directors, and designated persons from April 1, 2026
  • Window to remain closed till 48 hours after Board Meeting outcome or financial results declaration, whichever is later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vikas Lifecare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SANSERA] Sansera Engineering Ltd Changes Designation of Mr. Rahul Kale to Chief Executive Officer-Automotive
item.description:
Sansera Engineering Ltd has announced a change in designation of Mr. Rahul Kale from ‘Chief Operating Officer (COO)’ to ‘Chief Executive Officer-Automotive’ with effect from April 08, 2026. The change has been approved by the Board of Directors, pursuant to the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Kale will continue to report to Mr. B R Preetham, Executive Director & Group CEO of the Company.

  • Mr. Rahul Kale's designation changed to Chief Executive Officer-Automotive
  • Change approved by the Board of Directors and Nomination and Remuneration Committee
  • Mr. Kale will continue to report to Mr. B R Preetham

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sansera Engineering Ltd | Category: New Launch
